%%% FILE: @FIX@/src/sample.md LINES: 3-5 %%%
- bullet alpha: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
- bullet beta: pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs
- bullet gamma: how vexingly quick daft zebras jump
%%% END %%%

%%% FILE: @FIX@/src/sample.md LINES: 4-4 %%%

%%% END %%%

a long unique prose line with a straight 'apostrophe' inside it
